{"charset":"UTF-8","secretBaseEncoding":"NONE","baseEncoding":"BASE64","method":"HMAC_OUTBOUND_SIGNATURE_CALCULATION","secretType":"SCRIPT","name":"Paymetric 3DS Packet HMAC Signature_export","secret":"${vars.sharedKey}","source":"<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<merchantHtmlPacketModel xmlns="Paymetric:XiIntercept:MerchantHtmlPacketModel">
    <iFramePacket>
        <hostUri>${input.browserInfo.originUrl}/</hostUri>
        <cssUri>https://xiecomm.worldpay.com/diecomm/Content/IFrameStyleSheet.css</cssUri>
        <cardinal3DSecure amount="${input.amount}" currencyCode="${input.currencyAsNumeric}" orderNumber="${input.orderId}" redirectUri="${input.resultURL}" threeDSVersion="${vars.threeDSVersion}">
            <additionalFields/>
        </cardinal3DSecure>
    </iFramePacket>
    <merchantHtml>
        <htmlSection class="merchant_paycontent">
            <cardDropdownSection>
                <tag class="PaymentDetailHeader" name="div">Credit Card Payment</tag>
                <tag name="div">
                    <label for="cardType" text="card type"/>
                    <ddlCardType default-text="select a card type" id="cd">
                        <items>
                            <item for="mastercard" text="Master-Card">
                                <validateFor>
                                    <validate for="cvv" maxlength="3" maxlength-msg="Master Card cvv must be 3 digits" minlength="3" minlength-msg="Master Card cvv must be 3 digits"/>
                                </validateFor>
                            </item>
                            <item for="american express" text="American Express">
                                <validateFor>
                                    <validate for="cvv" minlength="4" maxlength="4" maxlength-msg="Amex cvv must be 4 digits" minlength-msg="Amex cvv must be 4 digits"/>
                                </validateFor>
                            </item>
                            <item for="visa" text="Visa">
                                <validateFor>
                                    <validate for="cvv" maxlength="3" maxlength-msg="Visa cvv must be 3 digits" minlength="3" minlength-msg="Visa cvv must be 3 digits"/>
                                </validateFor>
                            </item>
                        </items>
                    </ddlCardType>
                </tag>
                <tag name="div">
                    <label for="cardNumber" text="card number"/>
                    <tboxCardNumber is-numeric="false" mask-number="true" tokenize="true"/>
                    <validationMsg class="valmsg" for="cardNumber"/>
                </tag>
                <tag name="div">
                    <label for="cardholderName" text="name on card"/>
                    <tboxCardHolderName/>
                    <validationMsg class="valmsg" for="cardholderName"/>
                </tag>
                <tag name="div">
                    <label for="expDate" text="Exp date"/>
                    <ddlExpMonth class="merchant_combos" default-text="month" required="false"/>
                    <ddlExpYear class="merchant_combos" default-text="year" exp-date="true" required="false" years-to-display="10"/>
                    <validationMsg class="valmsg" for="expYear"/>
                </tag>
                <tag name="div">
                    <label for="cvv" text="card cvv"/>
                    <tboxCvv digits-only="true" digits-only-msg="Only digits are allowed in CVV field." required="false" required-msg="Please Enter CVV."/>
                    <validationMsg class="valmsg" for="cvv"/>
                </tag>
            </cardDropdownSection>
            <additionalHtmlSection>
            </additionalHtmlSection>
        </htmlSection>
    </merchantHtml>
</merchantHtmlPacketModel>","id":1023,"isHmacSignature":true,"hmacFields":{},"algorithm":"HmacSHA256"}

","jsContent":"function build3DSFields(myData) {
    var countryMap = {
        "US": "840", "CA": "124", "GB": "826", "DE": "276", "FR": "250",
        "IT": "380", "ES": "724", "NL": "528", "BE": "056", "CH": "756",
        "AT": "040", "JP": "392", "AU": "036", "SG": "702", "KR": "410", "CN": "156"
    };

    var billingCountry = OpfContext.billingAddress.country;
    var shippingCountry = OpfContext.shippingAddress.country;
  
  console.log("BillingCountryCode",countryMap[billingCountry]);
  console.log("BillingCountryState",OpfContext.billingAddress.state);
  console.log("javascript",OpfContext.browserInfo.javaScriptEnabled);
  console.log("javascript2 ", String(OpfContext.browserInfo.javaScriptEnabled));
  console.log("broser ", String(OpfContext.browserInfo));
  //console.log("javascript2 ", OpfContext.browserInfo.javaScriptEnabled?string);
  

    // Personal & contact info
    myData.addAdditional3DSField("Email", OpfContext.emailAddress);
    myData.addAdditional3DSField("MobilePhone", OpfContext.billingAddress.phoneNumber);

    // Billing address
    myData.addAdditional3DSField("BillingFirstName", OpfContext.billingAddress.firstName);
    myData.addAdditional3DSField("BillingLastName", OpfContext.billingAddress.lastName);
    myData.addAdditional3DSField("BillingAddress1", OpfContext.billingAddress.addressLine1);
    myData.addAdditional3DSField("BillingCity", OpfContext.billingAddress.city);
    myData.addAdditional3DSField("BillingPostalCode", OpfContext.billingAddress.postalCode);
    
    myData.addAdditional3DSField("BillingCountryCode", countryMap[billingCountry] || billingCountry);
    myData.addAdditional3DSField("BillingPhone", OpfContext.billingAddress.phoneNumber);
    if(billingCountry == "US" || billingCountry == "JP"){
       myData.addAdditional3DSField("BillingState", OpfContext.billingAddress.state);
    }

    // Shipping address
    myData.addAdditional3DSField("ShippingAddress1", OpfContext.shippingAddress.addressLine1);
    myData.addAdditional3DSField("ShippingCity", OpfContext.billingAddress.city);
    myData.addAdditional3DSField("ShippingPostalCode", OpfContext.shippingAddress.postalCode);
    myData.addAdditional3DSField("ShippingCountryCode", countryMap[shippingCountry] || shippingCountry);
    if(shippingCountry == "US" || shippingCountry == "JP"){
      myData.addAdditional3DSField("ShippingState", OpfContext.shippingAddress.state);
    }
    // Browser info
 // console.log("OpfContext.browserInfo.javaEnabled:",OpfContext.browserInfo.javaEnabled);
    myData.addAdditional3DSField("BrowserJavaEnabled", "True");
    myData.addAdditional3DSField("BrowserHeader", OpfContext.browserInfo.acceptHeader);
    myData.addAdditional3DSField("BrowserLanguage", OpfContext.browserInfo.language);
    myData.addAdditional3DSField("BrowserColorDepth", OpfContext.browserInfo.colorDepth);
    myData.addAdditional3DSField("BrowserScreenHeight", OpfContext.browserInfo.screenHeight);
    myData.addAdditional3DSField("BrowserScreenWidth", OpfContext.browserInfo.screenWidth);
    myData.addAdditional3DSField("BrowserTimeZone", OpfContext.browserInfo.timeZoneOffset);
    myData.addAdditional3DSField("UserAgent", OpfContext.browserInfo.userAgent);
    myData.addAdditional3DSField("IPAddress", OpfContext.browserInfo.ipAddress);
    myData.addAdditional3DSField("BrowserJavascriptEnabled", "True");
    myData.addAdditional3DSField("DeviceChannel", "Browser");

    // ACSWindowSize: 01=250x400, 02=390x400, 03=500x600, 04=600x400, 05=Full Page
    myData.addAdditional3DSField("ACSWindowSize", "03");
}

function makePayment(accessToken, signedToken) {
    var additionalData = [
        { 'key': 'accessToken', 'value': accessToken },
        { 'key': 'signedToken', 'value': signedToken }
    ];
    var submitBody = {
        'additionalData': additionalData,
        'submitSuccess': function (response) {
            console.log('submitSuccess');
        },
        'submitPending': function (response) {
            console.log('submitPending');
        },
        'submitFailure': function (response) {
            console.log('submitFailure');
            document.getElementById('paymetricSBtn').disabled = false;
        },
        'submitCancel': function (response) {
            window.location.href = '/checkout/opf-payment-and-review';
        }
    };
    window.Opf.payments.checkout.submit(submitBody);
}

function submitform() {
    var iframe = document.getElementsByName('dieCommFrame');
    if (!iframe || !iframe[0]) return;

    document.getElementById('paymetricSBtn').disabled = true;

    var accessToken = OpfContext.customFields.accessToken;
    var signedToken = OpfContext.customFields.signature;

    var myData = $XIPlugin.createJSRequestPacket(OpfContext.merchantId, accessToken);

    build3DSFields(myData);
  
   console.log("Mydata...",myData);

    $XIFrame.submit({
        iFrameId: 'dieCommFrame',
        targetUrl: iframe[0].getAttribute("src"),
        onSuccess: function (msg) {
            var message = JSON.parse(msg);
            if (message && message.data.HasPassed) {
                console.log("token and signature: ", accessToken + "&s=" + signedToken);
                console.log("message: ", message);
                makePayment(accessToken, signedToken);
            } else {
                console.log(message.data.Message);
                document.getElementById('paymetricSBtn').disabled = false;
            }
        },
        onError: function (msg) {
            console.log(msg);
            alert(msg);
            document.getElementById('paymetricSBtn').disabled = false;
        },
        threeDSVersion: OpfContext.vars.threeDSVersion,
        data: myData
    });
}

function IFrame_OnLoad() {
    var iframe = document.getElementsByName('dieCommFrame');
    if (iframe) {
        $XIFrame.onload({
            iFrameId: 'dieCommFrame',
            targetUrl: iframe[0].getAttribute("src"),
            autosizeheight: false,
            autosizewidth: false,
            onLoadSuccess: function (msg) {
                console.log('A form for the merchant guid and access token combination is loading in the iFrame successfully.');
            },
            onError: function (msg) {
                console.log('A form for the merchant guid and access token combination has FAILED to load.');
            }
        });
    }
}
